TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == wisin "kamu nu Ing, WeChat,Weixin" nu ten-sin kusi i 2011 a mihcaa 1 a bulad 21 a demiad nipatahkal tu mahiniay sapasubana', miedap tu Android,iOS,Windows,MacOS,Harmony OS NEXT,Linux a cacudaden. caau ku sapasubana' dada', macakat tu ku wisin u kapulungan sinsinbunan, mikawa mipaaca atu wangn-lu mukawaway tu kapulungan. ŚĺģšŅ°(ŤčĪŤ™ě:WeChat,Weixin) ,śĒĮśŹīAndroid,iOS,Windows,MacOS,Harmony OS NEXT,Linux . nilaculancaay kuyni adada', wisin patizeng tu tabakiay mikawaw tu mulangaway, pasu u wisin ku pasataay, bunawlan a banggu "pasu miciwmungay banggu atu mikawaway banggu, madayumay a cukaymasan, atu apuyu'ay suni nu iga banggu. micukaymasay taneng milakii' miciwbung minawlan banggu maala ku nisulitan pakatineng patinak mikawaw, anucaay madayumay a cukaymasan milisimet tu kawaw nikauzip tu demidemiad, caay tu picukaymas tu zumaay, sakasa u satinengay a sapicukaymas han. ś≠§Ś§Ė, . i saayaway a kumu, wisin napatinak i kitizaan nu binawlanan caitan tu sapicukaymas mahiniay "ngiyangi'", "malikid ku landaway" atu "capiay a tademaw", nika kilul tu nipaenengan a tuud kikasumad atu amikuwan, zuma palimadan ancaay caaytu u sapaazih. micukaymasay micukaymasay tu wisin saayaway hatu caay paacaen. inisulitan a lihalay, pawapen ku wisin tu mikulik tu masasukamu milimad atu misuped tuk amu. i mihcaanay, i App Store mapasawantanen tu 13 a mihcaan amicukaymas. katukuh 2025 a mihca 11 a bulad 13 a demiad, wisin atu WeChat papulung ku micukaymasay 14.14 oku, u cowng-kow ku sakatuuday nu micukaymasay a tademaws tu kapulungan sinsinbunan. wsin sa nu Congn-ko Sen-kenay ceusin-ke-ci kusi-ten-sin-kung a kusi i 2010 a mihca 10 a bulad amalingatu tu nilekakawaan, uyza ten-sin Kwng-cow nu migingkiway a sakaput nisanga'an a tuud. uyni a sakaput cin-li ci Cang-syaw-lung ku mikeliday tu sakaput malaheci milengad tu Foxmail,QQ wang-lu pipazengan tu tigami hatini nu wang-luay a akawaw. ten-sin kusi cung-cay ci Ma-hwa-ten pilekawaan tu tuud masapinang tuyni a tuudan "wisin" han a pangangan. saayaway a wisin maawas tu QQ a banggu macacayat a pacumud, zikuz kya maawas micumud tu kimaki mikiluk tu sapakatineng amicukaymas. ayaws nu 2011 a mihca 5 a bulad, pulung ku micukaymasay tu wisin pakala tu lima lasubu a mang. wisin tu pisakakamu palabuen tu micukaymasay macakat ku katuud. 2011 a mihca 8 a bulad, wisin pacunusen tu "mikinsa tu capiay a tademaw" tanenng malacabay tu kaliyuhan. katukuh 1500 emang ku micukaymasay.katukuh 2011 a mihcaan tu sazikuzay, malakui' tu 5000 emang ku micukaymasay , 2012 a mihca 3 a bulad malabas tu oku ku micukaymasay tu wisin.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == wisin "kamu nu iŇč, w…ô ¶ńßat,w…ôi*in" nu t…ôn-sin kusi i **** a mińß ¶aa * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad nipatańßkar~…ĺ tu mańßiniaj sapasubana Ē~ °, mi…ôdap tu android,ios,windows,ma ¶os,ńßarmonj os n…ô*t,r~…ĺinu* a ¶a ¶udad…ôn. ¶aau ku sapasubana Ē~ ° dada Ē~ °, ma ¶akat tu ku wisin u kapur~…ĺuŇčan sinsinbunan, mikawa mipaa ¶a atu waŇčn-r~…ĺu mukawawaj tu kapur~…ĺuŇčan. **(**:w…ô ¶ńßat,w…ôi*in) ,**android,ios,windows,ma ¶os,ńßarmonj os n…ô*t,r~…ĺinu* . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ¶aaj kujni adada Ē~ °, wisin patiz…ôŇč tu tabakiaj mikawaw tu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj, pasu u wisin ku pasataaj, bunawr~…ĺan a baŇčgu "pasu mi ¶iwmuŇčaj baŇčgu atu mikawawaj baŇčgu, madajumaj a ¶ukajmasan, atu apuju Ē~ °aj suni nu iga baŇčgu. mi ¶ukajmasaj tan…ôŇč mir~…ĺakii Ē~ ° mi ¶iwbuŇč minawr~…ĺan baŇčgu maar~…ĺa ku nisur~…ĺitan pakatin…ôŇč patinak mikawaw, anu ¶aaj madajumaj a ¶ukajmasan mir~…ĺisim…ôt tu kawaw nikauzip tu d…ômid…ômiad, ¶aaj tu pi ¶ukajmas tu zumaaj, sakasa u satin…ôŇčaj a sapi ¶ukajmas ńßan. **, . i saajawaj a kumu, wisin napatinak i kitizaan nu binawr~…ĺanan ¶aitan tu sapi ¶ukajmas mańßiniaj "ŇčijaŇči Ē~ °", "mar~…ĺikid ku r~…ĺandawaj" atu " ¶apiaj a tad…ômaw", nika kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu nipa…ôn…ôŇčan a tuud kikasumad atu amikuwan, zuma par~…ĺimadan an ¶aaj ¶aajtu u sapaazińß. mi ¶ukajmasaj mi ¶ukajmasaj tu wisin saajawaj ńßatu ¶aaj paa ¶a…ôn. inisur~…ĺitan a r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj, pawap…ôn ku wisin tu mikur~…ĺik tu masasukamu mir~…ĺimad atu misup…ôd tuk amu. i mińß ¶aanaj, i app stor…ô mapasawantan…ôn tu ** a mińß ¶aan ami ¶ukajmas. katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, wisin atu w…ô ¶ńßat papur~…ĺuŇč ku mi ¶ukajmasaj **.** oku, u ¶owŇč-kow ku sakatuudaj nu mi ¶ukajmasaj a tad…ômaws tu kapur~…ĺuŇčan sinsinbunan. wsin sa nu ¶oŇčn-ko s…ôn-k…ônaj ¶…ôusin-k…ô- ¶i kusi-t…ôn-sin-kuŇč a kusi i **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad amar~…ĺiŇčatu tu nir~…ĺ…ôkakawaan, ujza t…ôn-sin kwŇč- ¶ow nu migiŇčkiwaj a sakaput nisaŇča Ē~ °an a tuud. ujni a sakaput ¶in-r~…ĺi ¶i ¶aŇč-sjaw-r~…ĺuŇč ku mik…ôr~…ĺidaj tu sakaput mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i mir~…ĺ…ôŇčad tu fo*mair~…ĺ,** waŇč-r~…ĺu pipaz…ôŇčan tu tigami ńßatini nu waŇč-r~…ĺuaj a akawaw. t…ôn-sin kusi ¶uŇč- ¶aj ¶i ma-ńßwa-t…ôn pir~…ĺ…ôkawaan tu tuud masapinaŇč tujni a tuudan "wisin" ńßan a paŇčaŇčan. saajawaj a wisin maawas tu ** a baŇčgu ma ¶a ¶ajat a pa ¶umud, zikuz kja maawas mi ¶umud tu kimaki mikir~…ĺuk tu sapakatin…ôŇč ami ¶ukajmas. ajaws nu **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad, pur~…ĺuŇč ku mi ¶ukajmasaj tu wisin pakar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺima r~…ĺasubu a maŇč. wisin tu pisakakamu par~…ĺabu…ôn tu mi ¶ukajmasaj ma ¶akat ku katuud. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad, wisin pa ¶unus…ôn tu "mikinsa tu ¶apiaj a tad…ômaw" tan…ônŇč mar~…ĺa ¶abaj tu kar~…ĺijuńßan. katukuńß **** …ômaŇč ku mi ¶ukajmasaj.katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan tu sazikuzaj, mar~…ĺakui Ē~ ° tu **** …ômaŇč ku mi ¶ukajmasaj , **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺabas tu oku ku mi ¶ukajmasaj tu wisin.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == wisin "kamu nu Ing, WeChat,Weixin" nu ten-sin kusi i 2011 a mihcaa 1 a bulad 21 a demiad nipatahkal tu mahiniay sapasubana', miedap tu Android,iOS,Windows,MacOS,Harmony OS NEXT,Linux a cacudaden. caau ku sapasubana' dada', macakat tu ku wisin u kapulungan sinsinbunan, mikawa mipaaca atu wangn-lu mukawaway tu kapulungan. ŚĺģšŅ°(ŤčĪŤ™ě:WeChat,Weixin) ,śĒĮśŹīAndroid,iOS,Windows,MacOS,Harmony OS NEXT,Linux . nilaculancaay kuyni adada', wisin patizeng tu tabakiay mikawaw tu mulangaway, pasu u wisin ku pasataay, bunawlan a banggu "pasu miciwmungay banggu atu mikawaway banggu, madayumay a cukaymasan, atu apuyu'ay suni nu iga banggu. micukaymasay taneng milakii' miciwbung minawlan banggu maala ku nisulitan pakatineng tu kapulungan sinsinbunan. wsin sa nu Congn-ko Sen-kenay ceusin-ke-ci kusi-ten-sin-kung a kusi i 2010 a mihca 10 a bulad amalingatu tu nilekakawaan, uyza ten-sin Kwng-cow nu migingkiway a sakaput Ma-hwa-ten pilekawaan tu tuud masapinang tuyni a tuudan "wisin" han a pangangan. saayaway a wisin maawas tu QQ a banggu macacayat a pacumud, zikuz kya maawas micumud tu kimaki mikiluk tu sapakatineng amicukaymas. ayaws nu 2011 a mihca 5 a bulad, pulung ku micukaymasay tu wisin pakala tu lima lasubu a mang. wisin tu pisakakamu palabuen tu micukaymasay macakat ku katuud. 2011 a mihca 8 a bulad, wisin pacunusen tu "mikinsa tu capiay a tademaw" tanenng malacabay tu kaliyuhan. katukuh 1500 emang ku micukaymasay.katukuh 2011 a mihcaan tu sazikuzay, malakui' tu 5000 emang ku micukaymasay , 2012 a mihca 3 a bulad malabas tu oku ku micukaymasay tu wisin.

**** a mińß ¶aan tu sazikuzaj, mar~…ĺakui Ē~ ° tu **** …ômaŇč ku mi ¶ukajmasaj , **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺabas tu oku ku mi ¶ukajmasaj tu wisin.
